description: Comprehensive lesson outlines for all 33 modules. Each module defines lessons, learning objectives, key Mermaid diagrams, and hands-on elements. These outlines guide future lesson content creation.

lessons.title: TCP/IP Demystified
lessons.focus: Packet structure, 3-way handshake, OSI model with cloud context

lessons.title: DNS: The Internet's Phonebook
lessons.focus: Resolution chain, record types, TTL, DNS in cloud (Azure DNS, Route 53)

lessons.title: HTTP/HTTPS & TLS Deep Dive
lessons.focus: Request/response, status codes, TLS handshake, certificates, mTLS

lessons.title: Subnetting & CIDR Mastery
lessons.focus: CIDR notation, subnet calculation, VNet design patterns

lessons.title: Load Balancing Patterns
lessons.focus: L4 vs L7, algorithms, health probes, session affinity

lessons.title: Network Security & Firewalls
lessons.focus: NSGs, ASGs, Azure Firewall, WAF, DDoS protection

lessons.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Networking
lessons.focus: VPN, ExpressRoute, VNet peering, hub-spoke topology

lessons.title: Network Troubleshooting Lab
lessons.focus: tcpdump, Wireshark, Azure Network Watcher, connection issues

lessons.title: Security Fundamentals & Zero Trust
lessons.focus: CIA triad, defense in depth, Zero Trust architecture

lessons.title: IAM Design Patterns
lessons.focus: Users, groups, roles, service principals, managed identities

lessons.title: Encryption Everywhere
lessons.focus: At-rest, in-transit, key management, HSM, TLS everywhere

lessons.title: Secrets Management
lessons.focus: Key Vault, environment variables, secret rotation, workload identity

lessons.title: Threat Modeling
lessons.focus: STRIDE, attack trees, threat modeling in design phase

lessons.title: Network Security Operations
lessons.focus: NSG design, microsegmentation, DDoS response, WAF tuning

lessons.title: Compliance & Governance
lessons.focus: Azure Policy, regulatory compliance, audit logging, SOC2/ISO

lessons.title: Python Essentials for Cloud Engineers
lessons.focus: Virtual environments, pip, key libraries (requests, json, os)

lessons.title: Working with Cloud SDKs
lessons.focus: Azure SDK, boto3, authentication patterns, async operations

lessons.title: API Integration Patterns
lessons.focus: REST, pagination, rate limiting, retry logic, error handling

lessons.title: Infrastructure Automation Scripts
lessons.focus: Provisioning, health checks, backup automation, reporting

lessons.title: Testing Cloud Code
lessons.focus: pytest, mocking cloud services, integration tests, test fixtures

lessons.title: Building CLI Tools
lessons.focus: Click/argparse, configuration management, output formatting

lessons.title: What Is Cloud Computing?
lessons.focus: Definition, history, why cloud, cloud vs on-premises economics

lessons.title: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, FaaS Explained
lessons.focus: Service models with real Azure examples, shared responsibility for each

lessons.title: Cloud Economics & Business Case
lessons.focus: CapEx vs OpEx, TCO analysis, economies of scale

lessons.title: Regions, Zones & Global Infrastructure
lessons.focus: Region pairs, availability zones, edge locations, latency considerations

lessons.title: Resource Organization & Management
lessons.focus: Subscriptions, resource groups, management groups, tagging

lessons.title: Well-Architected Framework
lessons.focus: 5 pillars: Operational Excellence, Security, Reliability, Performance, Cost

lessons.title: Azure Portal & CLI Walkthrough
lessons.focus: Portal navigation, Cloud Shell, az CLI basics, resource creation

lessons.title: AZ-900 Practice & Review
lessons.focus: Exam format, key topics review, practice questions, test-taking strategy

lessons.title: Azure Compute Deep Dive
lessons.focus: VMs, VMSS, availability sets/zones, dedicated hosts

lessons.title: Azure App Service & Serverless
lessons.focus: Web Apps, Functions, Logic Apps, deployment slots

lessons.title: Azure Storage Services
lessons.focus: Blob, Files, Queues, Tables — access tiers, lifecycle management

lessons.title: Azure Virtual Networks
lessons.focus: VNet peering, service endpoints, private endpoints, NSGs

lessons.title: Azure Load Balancing
lessons.focus: Load Balancer, App Gateway, Front Door, Traffic Manager

lessons.title: Azure Databases
lessons.focus: SQL Database, CosmosDB, MySQL/PostgreSQL flexible server

lessons.title: Azure Monitoring & Backup
lessons.focus: Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights, Backup, Site Recovery

lessons.title: ARM Templates & Bicep
lessons.focus: Declarative Azure deployment, Bicep syntax, modules

lessons.title: Azure Governance
lessons.focus: Policy, Blueprints, locks, cost management, advisor

lessons.title: AZ-104 Practice & Review
lessons.focus: All 5 domains, scenario questions, hands-on labs review

lessons.title: What Are Containers Really?
lessons.focus: Process isolation, not light VMs; Linux primitives

lessons.title: Namespaces & Cgroups Deep Dive
lessons.focus: PID, net, mount, user namespaces; CPU/memory cgroups

lessons.title: OCI Specification & Runtimes
lessons.focus: OCI image spec, runtime spec, runc, containerd, CRI-O

lessons.title: Dockerfile Best Practices
lessons.focus: Layer caching, multi-stage builds, .dockerignore, non-root

lessons.title: Image Optimization & Security
lessons.focus: Size reduction, vulnerability scanning, distroless, SBOM

lessons.title: Docker Compose in Development
lessons.focus: Multi-service local dev, networking, volumes, profiles

lessons.title: Container Registries & CI/CD
lessons.focus: ACR, tagging strategy, image promotion, scanning in CI

lessons.title: Docker Networking Deep Dive
lessons.focus: Bridge, host, overlay networks; DNS; published ports

lessons.title: Kubernetes Architecture
lessons.focus: Control plane, etcd, kubelet, controllers, reconciliation loop

lessons.title: Pods & Workloads
lessons.focus: Pod lifecycle, Deployments, ReplicaSets, StatefulSets, DaemonSets

lessons.title: Services & Networking
lessons.focus: ClusterIP, NodePort, LoadBalancer, Ingress, NetworkPolicies

lessons.title: Configuration & Secrets
lessons.focus: ConfigMaps, Secrets, environment variables, CSI secrets

lessons.title: Storage in Kubernetes
lessons.focus: PV, PVC, StorageClasses, CSI drivers, Azure Disk/Files

lessons.title: RBAC & Security
lessons.focus: Roles, ClusterRoles, bindings, service accounts, PodSecurity

lessons.title: Resource Management & Autoscaling
lessons.focus: Requests/limits, QoS, HPA, VPA, cluster autoscaler

lessons.title: Observability on K8s
lessons.focus: Metrics-server, Prometheus, Grafana, logging architecture

lessons.title: Operators & CRDs
lessons.focus: Custom Resources, operator pattern, writing a simple operator

lessons.title: CKA/CKAD Preparation
lessons.focus: Exam format, hands-on practice, time management, key scenarios

lessons.title: Helm Architecture & Concepts
lessons.focus: Charts, releases, repositories, values, templates

lessons.title: Chart Development
lessons.focus: Chart structure, helpers, hooks, tests, dependencies

lessons.title: Production Helm Patterns
lessons.focus: OCI registries, Helmfile, GitOps with Helm, secrets

lessons.title: Terraform Fundamentals
lessons.focus: HCL, providers, resources, data sources, plan/apply workflow

lessons.title: State Management
lessons.focus: Local vs remote, locking, workspaces, state migration

lessons.title: Modules & Composition
lessons.focus: Module design, registry, versioning, composition patterns

lessons.title: Terraform in CI/CD
lessons.focus: GitHub Actions, Atlantis, plan on PR, apply on merge

lessons.title: Policy as Code
lessons.focus: Sentinel, OPA, Checkov, Infracost, compliance automation

lessons.title: Multi-Cloud & Advanced Patterns
lessons.focus: Multi-provider, data-only modules, terragrunt, drift detection
